case.title: ARCO AUTO CARRIERS, INC. v. ARKANSAS

opinion.h1: ARCO AUTO CARRIERS, INC. v. ARKANSAS, 365 U.S. 770 (1961)
opinion.h4: ARCO AUTO CARRIERS, INC., ET AL. v. ARKANSAS EX REL. BENNETT, ATTORNEY GENERAL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ARKANSAS. No. 785. Decided April 17, 1961.
opinion.p: George S. Dixon and Louis Tarlowski for appellants.
J. Frank Holt, Attorney General of Arkansas, and Bruce T. Bullion, Special Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
